---
title: "startsup.rip-scrape"
author: "Gabby Bui"
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

Load libraries

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(xml2)
library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
```

Get URLS

```{r}
sitemap <- read_xml("https://startups.rip/sitemap.xml")
ns <- xml_ns_rename(xml_ns(sitemap), d1 = "sm")

company_urls <- sitemap %>%
  xml_find_all("//sm:loc", ns) %>%
  xml_text() %>%
  .[str_detect(., "/company/")]
```

Scrape each company's page

```{r}
scrape_company <- function(url) {
  Sys.sleep(2)
  
  page <- tryCatch(read_html(url), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(page)) {
    return(tibble(url = url, company_name = NA, slug = str_extract(url, "[^/]+$"),
                  tagline = NA, status = NA, yc_batch = NA, founded = NA, full_text = NA))
  }
  
  page_text <- html_text(page)
  
  tibble(
    url = url,
    company_name = page %>% html_element("h2") %>% html_text(trim = TRUE),
    slug = str_extract(url, "[^/]+$"),
    tagline = page %>% html_elements("p") %>% html_text(trim = TRUE) %>% .[1],
    status = str_extract(page_text, "(Acquired|Dead|Active|Shutdown|Closed|Failed|Pivoted)"),
    yc_batch = str_extract(page_text, "(Summer|Winter|Fall|Spring)\\s+\\d{4}"),
    founded = str_extract(page_text, "Founded\\s*(\\d{4})") %>% str_extract("\\d{4}"),
    full_text = page %>% html_elements("h2, h3, p, li") %>% html_text(trim = TRUE) %>% paste(collapse = "\n\n")
  )
}

startups_data <- map_dfr(company_urls, scrape_company)
```

Extract key sections

```{r}
extract_section <- function(text, section_name) {
  if (is.na(text)) return(NA_character_)
  pattern <- paste0("(?s)", section_name, "\\n\\n(.*?)(?=\\n\\n(?:Overview|Founding Story|Timeline|What They Built|Market Position|Target Customers|Market Size|Competition|Business Model|Traction|Post-Mortem|Key Lessons|Sources|Technical Specs|$))")
  match <- str_extract(text, pattern)
  if (is.na(match)) return(NA_character_)
  str_remove(match, paste0("^", section_name, "\\n\\n")) %>% str_trim()
}

startups_enriched <- startups_data %>%
  mutate(
    overview = map_chr(full_text, ~extract_section(.x, "Overview")),
    business_model = map_chr(full_text, ~extract_section(.x, "Business Model")),
    post_mortem = map_chr(full_text, ~extract_section(.x, "Post-Mortem")),
    key_lessons = map_chr(full_text, ~extract_section(.x, "Key Lessons"))
  )
```

Test

```{r}
startups_enriched %>% select(-full_text) %>% print(n = Inf)
```

```{r}
startups_enriched %>% count(status, sort = TRUE)
```

```{r}
startups_enriched %>% count(yc_batch, sort = TRUE)
```
--> Looks like working!

Save

```{r}
write_csv(startups_enriched, "startups_rip_scraped.csv")
```
